default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review sprint progress, client status, and internal process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Rex is converting:** The client verbally agreed to a new strategy (tools + web dev), unblocking the account. The team must join Marcel's calls to learn his escalation tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Melrose is at risk:** A new stakeholder (Mariel) is challenging the strategy, creating a leadership/execution disconnect. Kathy will escalate to the CMO (John) to realign.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [**Check That pricing is now paid:** The tool is no longer a free value-add. This requires an immediate, clear internal policy for sprints to manage client expectations and avoid surprises.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**Major process improvements are coming:** A 14-day pre-sprint process and product management system will be built this week to improve client readiness and team efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=3270.0)

## Topics

### Client Status & Strategy

  - [**BlackSol:** Green. Client will renew based on process and partnership, not yet visible SEO growth. Organic search is a key business driver for them.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Turnstile:** Yellow, moving to green. 19 articles published. Feedback on older articles is being addressed. Ife is refining artifacts based on client and Zach's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Rex:** Green. Client verbally agreed to a new strategy: tools + web dev (site navigation, programmatic templates). Alex (check writer) is aligned; the team must get John (day-to-day contact) on board.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Havis:** Behind schedule. Artifacts are due today. The delay was caused by a new team member (Dasara) not being added to the channel. The client's advanced tech requires a strategic content approach.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
  - [**Talera:** Green. 3 articles reviewed, 5 in progress. Client approved the content calendar and is focused on conversion tracking (Amplitude). Hassan will provide conservative traffic projections.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**Melrose:** Red. A new stakeholder (Mariel) is challenging the content strategy, creating a leadership/execution disconnect. Kathy will escalate to the CMO (John) to realign.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [**Panther:** Blocked. A client-side publishing freeze (linked to engineering rollouts) is delaying content. Kathy will confirm the freeze is lifted and investigate the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [**Perloa:** Blocked. Nathalie lacks access to the keyword worksheet and style guide due to a Teams permissions issue. The product deep dive is also delayed.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [**Navon:** Converted\! The client officially signed. The new EM (Eric) is already familiar with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [**CRV:** Behind on feedback. The client (Krista) is a PR person with limited SEO knowledge, so the team is producing content without calibration. A 2-week gratis extension may be offered.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Witness:** Green. Kickoff is today. Artifacts are in progress using extensive client documentation. The client's investor is SentinelOne, a competitor to another client.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2993.0)

### Internal Process & Strategy

  - [**Client Conflict Management:** The team discussed how to handle clients who are competitors (e.g., Witness vs. SentinelOne). The agreed-upon response is to state that each account is managed by a separate, independent team.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=3049.0)
  - [**Check That Pricing:** The tool is no longer a free value-add. A clear internal policy for sprints is needed to manage client expectations and avoid surprises.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**ME/EM Collaboration:** Sydney will meet with Panzer to finalize a consistent process for MEs to join key calls (handoff, kickoff, deep dive) to build context and strategic partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2795.0)
  - [**Process Improvements:** This week's focus is on building a 14-day pre-sprint process and a new product management system to improve client readiness and team efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=3270.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kathy:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [Confirm Panther's publishing freeze is lifted; investigate the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [Escalate to Melrose's CMO (John) to realign strategy with Mariel.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2117.0)
      - [Ask Talera for Amplitude dashboard access.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)
      - [Hand off Daylight account to George for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2954.0)
  - [**Hassan:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
      - [Submit an ENDS ticket for a new fan-out post pipeline and guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Provide conservative traffic projections to Talera.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [**Nathalie:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
      - [Submit an ENDS ticket for Perloa's blog imagery.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
      - [Review Perloa's content ideas for duplicates and get topic approval from Dora.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2535.0)
  - [**Ife:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Refine Turnstile's artifacts based on recent feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Biserastankovska:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2683.0)
      - [Complete Havis artifacts today.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2758.0)
      - [Meet with the Board Room to discuss Havis content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [**Sydney:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2795.0)
      - [Meet with Panzer to finalize the ME/EM collaboration process.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2795.0)
  - [**Board Room:**](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [Clarify the Check That pricing policy for sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [Meet with Turnstile's Seema to discuss engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Conduct kickoff calls for Fieldwire and Witness.](https://fathom.video/share/3jfA1n65uo8iPKw5i1e2nyYdg6_viYQx?tab=summary&timestamp=2987.0)

Produce 3 articles + 4 fan-out posts this week

Email Victoria re: conversion timing + decision-maker; offer Phase 1 summary; request invite list
Confirm Panther publishing freeze status; if clear, publish 1st article

Email Seema re: LLM KPIs (sentiment, citation share)
Schedule 1:1 w/ Panther CMO to build relationship
Prepare Talera CTAs; coordinate w/ Paola to build in WP

Review Check That pricing/positioning; align team on sprint vs standalone

Submit ENDS tickets: weave case study metrics; add stats artifact to Atlas

Review Little of Talent LLM keywords/prompts; update Check That; adjust strategy

Start Witness artifacts using provided docs
